channel.title: 0DTE on Dalvin | Trader Portfolio
channel.description: Recent content in 0DTE on Dalvin | Trader Portfolio

item.title: 001 — SPY 0DTE | Morning Momentum Scalp
item.description: Bought SPY calls at the open on a gap-and-go continuation. Scaled out into strength.

item.title: 002 — SPY 0DTE Put | Overnight High Failure
item.description: Bought 1 SPY 0DTE put after a failed breakout above the overnight high with no acceptance. +70% gain. Missed the reversal long after close.
